# NeuroSinc

NeuroSinc is a hardware and software system -- specialized headphones with integrated multimodal neuro-synchronization technology designed to help people reach states of calm, deep sleep, or focused attention. Sessions last 15 to 30 minutes. No effort or practice required from the user.

## Programs

- Sleep: designed to help the brain wind down and transition into sleep
- Calm: designed to reduce feelings of stress and mental overactivity
- Focus: designed to support sustained attention and mental clarity

## Technology

The system combines binaural beats, monaural pulses, isochronic tones, ASMR, and 3D spatial sound in a single integrated session. Hardware and software are inseparable -- this is not an app or a streaming service.

## Testing

Developed over 5 years of R&D. Tested with 800+ participants. 95% reported deep relaxation after their first session (internal testing).

## Status

Pre-launch. Kickstarter campaign forthcoming. Waitlist available at neurosinc.com.

## Contact

neurosinc.com/contact
